Stomp the Yard (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $61,356,221Details
International Box Office $14,169,497
Worldwide Box Office $75,525,718
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $33,575,493
Total $33,575,493
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,833,312 (35.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.81 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:81.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$14,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,051 opening theaters/2,169 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $106,659,938

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 12th, 2007 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: May 15th, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for a scene of violence, some sexual material and language.
Running Time: 116 minutes
Franchise: Stomp the Yard
Plot point: African Americans, Coming of Age, Dancing
Social setting: Black Urban
Subgenre: Sports Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
